HT-TICKET-1001.description: Fibre link cut between main DC and Delmas BLC site. Solaired-powered Starlink fails to initialize.
HT-TICKET-1001.resolution_notes: Fibre link remained down, but Starlink terminal was manually reset and secondary satellite antenna was aligned. Connection stable.

HT-TICKET-1002.description: Dual-entry validation fails on 4 files. System blocks enrollment for matching CIN.

HT-TICKET-1003.description: Biometric USB camera lens got scratched during transport. Image quality score below OACI threshold.
HT-TICKET-1003.resolution_notes: Field Strike team replaced the physical camera with a backup unit from the department hub. Standard OACI validation tests passed.

HT-TICKET-1004.description: Local Edge Node database integrity error during delayed sync. Corrupted WAL file.
